<!--
Please fill in the template below. Japanese is welcome.
PR title format: <type>(<scope>): <short title>  (例: feat(filedb): V2 tag decoder)
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? 2-5 bullet points. -->
-

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] update (feature enhancement, not a bug fix)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] perf (performance)
- [ ] docs (documentation only)
- [ ] test (test-only)
- [ ] chore (tooling / config / CI)
- [ ] release (version bump / changelog)

## Test plan

<!-- Commands you ran locally and what you verified. -->
- [ ] `uv run pytest` all green
- [ ] Coverage not lower than base branch
- [ ] Manual check against a real `.a7s` save (if touching parser)

## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] **Copilot code review requested** (required before merge)
- [ ] Human reviewer assigned
- [ ] Scope is tight; no unrelated changes bundled
- [ ] New parser logic cites a format reference (upstream code, spec doc, or new `docs/` entry)

## Screenshots / logs (optional)
